subcodes.first_line: Esteemed friend, thy letter was received and read. Praise be to God, it indicated thy health and well-being [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: دوست مکرم نامه شما رسید قرائت شد لله الحمد مشعر بر سلامتی و صحت مزاج شما بود
subcodes.subjects: @personal instructions, @trust and reliance in God; turning to Him at all times, @forgiveness; grace; bounty; mercy; compassion of God, @thankfulness; gratitude, @servitude; submission to God; repentance, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God
